headline: MetLife, Unum Group, Wells Fargo, AWS, and Cognizant to Keynote at PegaWorld 2026
summary: WALTHAM, Mass., March 03, 2026--Pegasystems Inc. (NASDAQ: PEGA), The Enterprise Transformation CompanyTM, today announced keynote speakers for PegaWorld 2026, Pega’s annual conference to be held at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas, NV, from June 7-9, 2026.

headline: Cognizant Grows Through Expanding Clientele & Strong Partnerships
summary: CTSH rides on rising bookings, billion-dollar deals, and AI-driven partnerships to fuel growth and set upbeat 2026 revenue and earnings guidance.

headline: Cognizant Technology Solutions (NASDAQ:CTSH) Presents a Classic Value Investment Case
summary: Cognizant Technology Solutions (CTSH) presents a classic value investing case, trading at an attractive valuation with strong financial health, solid profitability, and a reliable dividend.
